commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=90d170c252ade298ab3270b4e2b9f53c9767c337)
commands.review_summary:
The PR routes all CJK trigram tokens to LIKE matching and retries every zero-result FTS MATCH query with OR-based LIKE predicates.

PR surface: Source +21. Total +21 across 1 file.

Reproducibility: no. not at high confidence in a real setup. The current source path is clear, but the claimed failure for long CJK terms conflicts with SQLite’s documented trigram behavior and lacks actual-schema runtime evidence.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] The author needs to revise the two blocking retrieval changes and provide real-environment proof; automation cannot supply proof from the contributor’s setup.

target.title: fix(memory-core): CJK textScore=0 + empty MATCH LIKE fallback
target.author: rrriiiccckkk

commands.reason: repair commands require a ClawSweeper PR or a PR opted into ClawSweeper autofix or automerge
